title: User Login
description: The system shall allow a user to select a mock account and log into the application.

title: Project Creation
description: The system shall allow the user to create and save a project with name owner and description.

title: Requirement Tracking
description: The system shall allow the user to create view and update project requirements.

title: CSV Persistence
description: The system shall persist project data in CSV files instead of a traditional database.

title: Dashboard Summary
description: The system shall display total requirements completed requirements total hours and open risks on the dashboard.
